title: Functions in R
Data Frames in R
text:
Creating Data Frames

students <- data.frame(
  Name=c("A","B","C"),
  Marks=c(80,70,90)
)

students

  Name Marks
1    A    80
2    B    70
3    C    90

title: Vectors in R
text:
Creating Vectors

x <- c(1,2,3,4)
x

[1] 1 2 3 4




Vector Arithmetic

x + 10

[1] 11 12 13 14
